title: NPC Autopilot
description: Foundry VTT NPC combat autopilot for D&D 5e. v3.8.0: Ollama Bridge AI narration integration — dynamic target lock, attack, kill, and round-start narration. Soft dependency, safe without. v3.7.14: renamed to NPC Autopilot. v3.7.13: targeting, movement, hit-indicator, and melee-positioning fixes.
